title: medicago minima subvar. stenophylla
intro: Medicago minima subvar. stenophylla, also known as the small bird's-foot trefoil or narrow-leaved medick, is a variety of the medicago minima plant that belongs to the Fabaceae family. It is a perennial herb native to Europe and Asia, valued for its medicinal properties and health benefits. The plant is rich in flavonoids, saponins, and other bioactive compounds that have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including digestive issues, inflammation, and respiratory problems. Medicago minima subvar. stenophylla can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, and has also been used in traditional medicine to support digestive health and boost the immune system.
